title: My Skill Treasure
subtitle: A treasure-chest view of my technical toolkit across planning, control, learning, and robotics.

categories.name: Control
categories.description: Feedback control, optimal regulation, and safety-aware motion control.

skills.name: PID
skills.detail: Classical feedback control for dependable tracking and regulation loops.
skills.proficiency: Comfortable tuning gains, filtering derivatives, and handling integral windup.

skills.name: LQR
skills.detail: Linear quadratic regulator design for stabilizing linearized dynamical systems.
skills.proficiency: Use Riccati-based feedback design for state regulation and local trajectory tracking.

skills.name: MPC
skills.detail: Receding-horizon constrained control with explicit optimization at each step.
skills.proficiency: Modeling costs and constraints for trajectory tracking and smooth control actions.

skills.name: iLQR
skills.detail: Iterative optimal control for nonlinear systems using local quadratic approximations.
skills.proficiency: Useful for shooting-based trajectory optimization and local policy refinement.

skills.name: CBF
skills.detail: Control barrier functions for encoding safety constraints into low-level control.
skills.proficiency: Combine safety filters with nominal controllers to maintain safe sets.

categories.name: Planning
categories.description: Search, sampling, and trajectory generation methods for motion planning.

skills.name: A*
skills.detail: Heuristic graph search for shortest-path planning on discrete representations.
skills.proficiency: Comfortable designing heuristics, costs, and efficient frontier updates.

skills.name: Hybrid A*
skills.detail: Kinematically aware search for car-like systems in continuous pose space.
skills.proficiency: Use motion primitives and heuristics for feasible parking and maneuver plans.

skills.name: RRT*
skills.detail: Sampling-based planning with rewiring for improved path quality over time.
skills.proficiency: Useful for continuous configuration spaces and asymptotic path improvement.

skills.name: Frenet
skills.detail: Reference-line trajectory generation in longitudinal and lateral coordinates.
skills.proficiency: Generate and rank lane-aligned candidate trajectories with comfort constraints.

skills.name: DWA
skills.detail: Dynamic window local planning with admissible velocity sampling and scoring.
skills.proficiency: Use short-horizon rollout scoring for reactive local collision avoidance.

categories.name: Learning
categories.description: Reinforcement learning and modern sequence or generative modeling methods.

skills.name: Q-Learn
skills.detail: Tabular value-based reinforcement learning with Bellman updates.
skills.proficiency: Good foundation for reasoning about exploration, value updates, and policies.

skills.name: DQN
skills.detail: Deep Q-learning with neural approximation for value-based control.
skills.proficiency: Familiar with replay buffers, target networks, and stability tradeoffs.

skills.name: PPO
skills.detail: Policy-gradient reinforcement learning using clipped surrogate objectives.
skills.proficiency: Comfortable training stable policy updates with batched rollouts.

skills.name: SAC
skills.detail: Entropy-regularized actor-critic learning for sample-efficient continuous control.
skills.proficiency: Useful when strong stochastic exploration and stable off-policy learning matter.

skills.name: Diffusion
skills.detail: Denoising-based generative modeling for structured trajectories or actions.
skills.proficiency: Understand iterative sampling, schedulers, and conditional generation workflows.

categories.name: Robotics
categories.description: Systems integration, autonomy software, and perception-oriented robotics tooling.

skills.name: ROS 2
skills.detail: Robot middleware for modular nodes, topics, services, and system integration.
skills.proficiency: Comfortable wiring pipelines, launch files, and message-driven robot software.

skills.name: SLAM
skills.detail: Mapping and localization workflows for structured and partially unknown environments.
skills.proficiency: Understand pose estimation, map updates, and drift management at a systems level.

skills.name: Fusion
skills.detail: Sensor fusion for combining noisy observations into a more stable state estimate.
skills.proficiency: Use multi-sensor reasoning across IMU, odometry, and exteroceptive measurements.

skills.name: Vision
skills.detail: Applied perception workflows for detection, tracking, and scene understanding.
skills.proficiency: Comfortable connecting learned perception outputs to downstream planning or control.

skills.name: Gazebo
skills.detail: Simulation-driven development for testing robot behavior before hardware runs.
skills.proficiency: Use simulators for integration tests, controller tuning, and debugging.
